project.name: pylometree
project.description: General-purpose Python toolkit for tree allometry — fitting, evaluating, and looking up allometric equations for H-D relationships, above- and below-ground biomass, crown structure, stem volume, and height-age growth.
project.org: XR Future Forests Lab, University of Freiburg

layers.name: models
layers.role: Pure equation functions (hd, biomass, crown, volume) — no I/O, no state, vectorized over NumPy arrays

layers.name: fitting
layers.role: scipy curve_fit wrapper, bootstrap CIs, AIC-based select_model

layers.name: metrics
layers.role: R2, RMSE, MAE, bias, AIC, AICc, MSA (Burt & Disney), SSPB (Burt & Disney)

layers.name: registry
layers.role: Searchable model registry — ModelEntry + ModelRegistry, pre-loaded published equations

layers.name: data
layers.role: Tree and Stand dataclasses with plot-level aggregation and AGB/carbon stock estimation

layers.name: yield_tables
layers.role: Self-contained subsystem: multi-source ingestion (providers.py), normalization, offline-first runtime resolution (resolver.py), CLI (pylometree-ingest)

key_decisions: Variable naming follows allometric R package: dsob (DBH outside bark cm), hst (stem height m)
Strict model_type matching in registry — agb does not match crown_agb
Back-transformation bias correction via Sprugel 1983 (CF = e^{MSE/2}) applied explicitly
No implicit unit conversion — callers pass correct units per model docstring
Yield-table resolution is offline-first — no API calls at query time
No PyPI publication — git-based dependency (decision XRFF-131)
extension_points: New yield table provider: subclass YieldTableProvider in yield_tables/providers.py
New H-D/biomass form: add function to module, add to _MODELS dict

functional: Fit 12 H-D equation forms to field data with scipy curve_fit wrapper
AIC-based model selection across all H-D forms
Bootstrap confidence intervals for fitted parameters
Estimate AGB with power-law M1-M4, Chave 2014 pantropical, Musa NSUR, and crown-based equations (Jucker 2017, Htoo 2025)
Estimate stem volume with form-factor and power-law models
Tree and Stand dataclasses with carbon stock computation and per-hectare aggregation
Searchable registry of published allometric equations (queryable by type, species, region)
CSV and DataFrame ingestion to Tree/Stand
Yield table ingestion from R packages, Excel, PDF, and JSON parametric models
Offline-first yield table resolution by species, region, site index
CLI (pylometree-ingest) for yield table store management
MSA and SSPB metrics for asymmetric biomass error characterization
non_functional: No network access at runtime (yield tables offline-first)
Graceful provider disabling when optional deps missing

principles: Pure functions in models/ — no I/O, no state
Strict model type matching — no implicit cross-type queries
Explicit back-transformation bias correction — not silent
No implicit unit conversion — document units in every docstring
Src layout for clean package separation
Black 88-char formatting, snake_case, type hints on public functions
principles_notes.code_style: Black (88 char), snake_case, type hints on public API, allometric R naming convention (dsob, hst)
principles_notes.contributing: One logical change per MR, update CHANGELOG.md under [Unreleased], pytest required

infrastructure_notes.data_files: data/ directory for yield tables and input CSVs
